title: DIY Campfires
description: A mod that adds a simple building mechanic to Campfires.
body:
![alt](https://i.postimg.cc/jS028Twn/diy-campfires-title-logo.png)
**DIY Campfires** is a mod for Forge 1.20.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1. that adds a simple building mechanic to Campfires. A small, lightweight, simple, vanilla friendly mod! A project from MarbledHubb Studios.

## Features
- **Firewood**. Crafted from placing 2 logs vertically in a crafting grid.
- **Stacking mechanic**. Stack 4 Firewood on top of each other.
  - **Campfire**. Holding either Coal or Charcoal, simply click on Firewood in it's 4th stacked state.
  - **Soul Campfire**. Holding either Soul Soil or Soul Sand, simply click on Firewood in it's 4th stacked state.
  - **Item tags**. You can add compatibility and items to define what Campfire is built. #diy_campfires:campfire_igniter for regular Campfires, and #diy_campfires:soul_campfire_igniter for Soul Campfires.
## Usage
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

[Want to know what else you can DIY? You can easily rent a server with BisectHosting and use our code "marbledhubb" to save 25% your first month! Easy enough to do it yourself.](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)
